title: Sigh; disable pod-top test, it's unreliable (#2780)

comments.body: This is failing very frequently on RHEL8, preventing me from packaging gating tests. It's a simple fix, I'd appreciate expedited approval. TIA.
Github didn't autolink the issue in the title: #2780

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).
